description: Your restaurant is opening a new outdoor patio for the summer season. Configure the Floreant POS Back Office to support this new section. Create a restaurant floor section named 'PATIO' with six tables named 'P1', 'P2', 'P3', 'P4', 'P5', and 'P6'. Create a tax rate called 'LIQUOR TAX' at 9.5%. Create a menu category called 'PATIO SPECIALS' containing these items: 'SANGRIA PITCHER' ($18.00), 'PALOMA COCKTAIL' ($11.00), 'DRAFT BEER PATIO' ($6.50), 'LOADED NACHOS' ($13.95), and 'GRILLED CORN' ($4.75). Back Office PIN is 1111.
